title: Fix recorded syllabus sync and quarantine sensitive archives
summary: Added server-truth sync behavior for recorded syllabus asset status in admin.
Auto-clears stale RTDB recorded asset URLs when files do not exist on server.
Moved sensitive local transfer/deployment archives into a locked local vault and removed them from git tracking.

changes.what: Changed refresh behavior into full server sync plus stale URL cleanup and save.
changes.why: RTDB URL existence alone caused false positive lesson icons after bulk upload and stale links.
changes.how: Checked server file presence per video/material URL, cleared missing URLs and dependent fields, persisted cleanup with merge-skip save path, and updated app bar action icon/tooltip.

changes.what: Added ignore rules for local locked vault and sensitive archive sources.
changes.why: Prevent accidental recommit of credential-bearing local artifacts.
changes.how: Ignored _LOCAL_LOCKED_SECRETS_DO_NOT_DELETE/, local transfer directory, and selected top-level zip archives.

changes.why: Deployment archive should not remain versioned due to security risk.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.why: Project archive is local artifact and can contain sensitive data.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.why: Log references credential archive handling and should remain local-only.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.why: Archive includes sensitive API/service-account backup data.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.why: Contains service account private key material.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.
Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.why: Storage archive may include sensitive assets.
changes.how: Moved to local vault and committed deletion from git tree.

changes.what: Updated human-readable release log for this commit.
changes.why: Provide audit-friendly narrative of intent, impact, and validation.
changes.how: Recorded what/why/how entries for every tracked change and security action.

changes.what: Updated machine-readable commit log schema payload for this commit.
changes.why: Enable deterministic tooling to parse commit scope and validation outcomes.
changes.how: Wrote structured summary, per-file actions, and validation command results.

validation.result: No new errors introduced by this change (existing warnings/infos remain).
Only intended files are modified/deleted before commit.
Immutable flag unsupported on current filesystem; permission lock retained.
